source.filename: Chronic Low Back Pain (Radicular Overlap) CFE-006.txt

attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CFE (Complex Fatigue Entities) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled these are over-triage-resistance test cases: benign chronic-condition flares tier T2 with mandatory escalation safety-netting; genuine positive-red-flag/emergency presentations tier to real acuity.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CFE casebundles in this batch (n=50)

codes_manifest.display: Lumbar and other intervertebral disc disorders with radiculopathy

transform_flags: Age not stated in the source note — inferred adult (~45) from a chronic disc-herniation history and 88 kg body weight; confirm on clinician review.
Sex not stated in the source note — inferred male; confirm on clinician review.
Geographic remoteness not stated — omitted; the clinically load-bearing social context (lives alone, fall risk) is captured in living_situation and contextual_modifiers.
Provisional case_id SEQ 00206 (from source CFE-006) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-PAIN-03 bucket via ingest --reseq.

Difficulty classified red_herring_laden: alarming severity, functional immobility, and an 'urgent evaluation to rule out cord compression' framing act as red herrings; the source's own acute red-flag screen is NEGATIVE and its disposition routine (GP in 3 days) — the case tests over-triage resistance.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person home visit. Clinician-administered Ketorolac 30 mg IM is not deliverable by the AI Doctor and is reprojected to recognition + arranging in-person analgesia. The clinician neuro exam (SLR, power, reflexes, perianal sensation) and clinician-measured vitals (BP 145/90, HR 98) are sealed into 10/11; the cauda-equina exclusion is reprojected to patient-answerable history questions in 02.
Low-dose doxycycline (claimed MMP-inhibitor) and PEA from the source's 'targeted intervention' are encoded as an error of commission / weak-evidence and are not recommended.
Pregabalin 75 mg nocte dose is taken verbatim from the source note; no dose was synthesised. Amitriptyline is offered as an acceptable alternative with no invented dose.
Candidate codes only; the AMT pregabalin code is a placeholder pending a terminology receipt; all codes are unverified_pending_terminology_receipt.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
